name: Bye-Bye Birdy Curry Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 Granny Smith Apple, peeled and finely diced
3/4 cup Pineapple, crushed and drained well
8 1/4 ounces Pineapple, crushed and drained well
recipeInstructions:
1. Use Gorgonzola cheese if available; otherwise, any blue-veined cheese will do.
2. Mix the water and lemon juice in a small bowl.
3. Slice the Granny Smith apple and put the slices into the lemon water to soak. Set aside.
4. In a serving bowl, combine the mayonnaise with the celery, pineapple, curry powder, salt, and pepper. Blend well.
5. Add the cashews to the mixture and blend again.
6. Remove the apple slices from the lemon water and dice them.
7. Stir the diced apple into the mixture, then stir in the Gorgonzola cheese until well combined.
8. Cover and chill. Makes about 2 cups of dip.
9. Suggested dippers: Pita triangles, bread chunks, radishes, scallions, turnips, bell peppers.
